name: Colonial Heritage
description: Colonial Heritage is a place to play pickleball in Williamsburg, VA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Ford's Colony at Williamsburg
description: Ford's Colony at Williamsburg is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Williamsburg, VA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private.

name: James City County Recreation Center
description: James City County Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Williamsburg, VA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Jamestown High School
description: Jamestown High School is a place to play pickleball in Williamsburg, VA. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Kingsmill Mounts Bay Pickleball Courts
description: Kingsmill Mounts Bay Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Williamsburg, VA. There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Free for residents of Kingsmill

name: Kingsmill Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Kingsmill Resort in Williamsburg, VA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Quarterpath Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Quarterpath Recreation Center in Williamsburg, VA! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: The Picklr Williamsburg
description: Come play pickleball at The Picklr Williamsburg in Williamsburg, VA! There are 11 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, locker rooms, youth programming, water, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming.

name: Two Rivers at Governor's Land Pickleball
description: Pickleball Courts in a Private Gated Community
fees: Private — Free to Residents and Guests of Residents

name: Two Rivers Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Two Rivers Country Club in Williamsburg, VA! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.

name: Veterans Park
description: Veterans Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Williamsburg, VA. There are 8 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Williamsburg Indoor Sports Complex
description: Williamsburg Indoor Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Williamsburg, VA. There are 3 indoor wood and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and food.
open_play_schedule: Pickleball hours change seasonally so call to verify hours and for more information
fees: Fee required — $5 daily fee for non-members
